$comment: SPDX-License-Identifier: MPL-2.0 — per-repo pool/tier assignment (the bot_directive merge policy); maps to standards TRUST levels. Wave-0 artifact 5. Copyright (c) 2026 Jonathan D.A. Jewell.
title: RepoPoolPolicy

campaign_ref.description: required when pool=mass_squash; time-boxed authorization id

allOf.$comment: PL1 — a core-tier repo may not be P3 (don't aggressively auto-merge the infra that does the auto-merging).
PL2 — mass_squash requires a campaign_ref (time-boxed authorization).
